title: HouseSigma Property Listings Scraper
description: Scrape property listings from HouseSigma.com. Provide a start URL or use the default newly listed page.

startUrl.title: Start URL
startUrl.description: Start scraping from a specific HouseSigma listings URL. Defaults to newly listed.

results_wanted.title: Maximum number of listings
results_wanted.description: The maximum number of property listings to collect.

max_pages.title: Maximum number of pages
max_pages.description: A safety cap on the number of listing pages to visit.

includeGallery.title: Include gallery images
includeGallery.description: When enabled, fetches full gallery images for each listing. Disable for the fastest runs.
